verdict_reason: The implication gives a concrete reproducible artifact: 'audit your standing review. Name three signals it excludes and the implicit there is nothing else clause those exclusions express.' That is something a senior architect or PM can run on next Monday's standing review template. The diagnostic is named (the closure clause), not metaphorical. The counter-example clarifies when focused attention is correct (load-bearing metric for next quarter, with deprioritisation date). The verse is reproducible in real org practice, not pure metaphor. PASS.
